description: Real-Time Intelligence Demo — Azure Sub + Phone Telemetry

eventhouse.description: Analytics engine for Azure Activity + Phone Telemetry

kql_database.description: KQL Database with AzureActivity (Region) and PhoneTelemetry (City) tables

eventstreams.description: Ingests Azure Activity Log from Event Hub
Ingests phone sensor data from Event Hub

kql_queryset.description: 30 pre-built KQL queries including ML (anomaly detection, forecasting, clustering)

tiles.title: Activity Timeline
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(Timestamp, 5m), Level
| render timechart

tiles.title: Failed Operations
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| where Level == "Error"
| project Timestamp, OperationName, ResourceGroup, Caller
| order by Timestamp desc
| take 50

tiles.title: Operations by Caller
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize count() by Caller
| top 10 by count_
| render piechart

tiles.title: Error Rate
tiles.query:
AzureActivity
| summarize ErrorRate = round(100.0 * countif(Level == "Error") / count(), 1)

tiles.title: Battery Levels
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| summarize avg(BatteryLevel) by City, bin(Timestamp, 1m)
| render timechart

tiles.title: Device Locations
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by DeviceId
| project DeviceId, User, City, Latitude, Longitude, BatteryLevel, NetworkType

tiles.title: App Crashes
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| where CrashCount > 0
| summarize TotalCrashes = sum(CrashCount) by AppName
| order by TotalCrashes desc
| render columnchart

tiles.title: Fleet Status
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| summarize arg_max(Timestamp, *) by DeviceId
| project DeviceId, User, City, BatteryLevel, NetworkType, CpuUsage, SignalStrength
| order by BatteryLevel asc

tiles.title: Ingestion Rate
tiles.query:
union
  (AzureActivity | summarize Events = count() by bin(Timestamp, 1m) | extend Source = "Azure"),
  (PhoneTelemetry | summarize Events = count() by bin(Timestamp, 1m) | extend Source = "Phone")
| render timechart

tiles.title: Signal Strength Trend
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| summarize AvgSignal = avg(SignalStrength) by DeviceId, bin(Timestamp, 5m)
| render timechart

tiles.title: Network Distribution
tiles.query:
PhoneTelemetry
| summarize count() by NetworkType
| render piechart

activator.description: Automated alert rules for operations monitoring

rules.name: Azure Error Spike
rules.message: High Azure error rate detected: {ErrorCount} errors in last 10 minutes

rules.name: App Crash Burst
rules.message: App {AppName} crash burst: {TotalCrashes} crashes in 5 minutes

rules.name: Device Offline
rules.message: Device {DeviceId} has not reported for 5+ minutes

data_agent.description: Natural language queries on RTI demo data — ask questions about Azure activity and phone telemetry

ops_agent.description: Autonomous operational investigation agent — monitors real-time data, analyzes anomalies, correlates Azure activity with phone telemetry, and recommends business actions

anomaly_detector.description: Anomaly detection on phone battery levels, signal strength, crash rates, and Azure error spikes
